steps.title: Identify what the blank requires
steps.content: The sentence says the fossils are so well preserved that the team has been able to ______ detailed information about the life forms — things like color patterns and species interactions. The blank needs a word meaning to gain or acquire information from a source.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• "occupy": Means to inhabit or engage. Information cannot be inhabited or occupied — this makes no sense in context. ✗
  • "hoard": Means to collect and hide away. Nothing in the passage suggests the team is concealing the information; they are scientists studying and sharing findings. ✗
  • "reserve": Means to withhold or set aside. Again, nothing indicates the team is holding the information back rather than gathering it. ✗
  • "obtain": Means to acquire or gain. The paleontologists are gaining detailed information from the well-preserved fossils — exactly what "obtain" expresses. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
